display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Maximum one per page.

headline.purpose: Section headers, card titles, page headers.

title.purpose: Sub-section labels, course names, job titles.

body.purpose: Descriptions, chat messages, explanations. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, category tags, field labels, badges.

mono.purpose: Course codes, salary figures, data values.

shadows.name: brand-whisper
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow on hover/focus. Diffuse, brand-tinted glow.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Dramatic card-lift hover effect paired with translateY(-4px).

shadows.name: stat-card-glow
shadows.purpose: Gradient stat card shadow, tinted with Depth Blue.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (focus, hover).

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: hover effects, focus rings.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Page transitions, content reveals, loading states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Always includes an icon left of label.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg class="ds-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m12 3-1.912 5.813a2 2 0 0 1-1.275 1.275L3 12l5.813 1.912a2 2 0 0 1 1.275 1.275L12 21l1.912-5.813a2 2 0 0 1 1.275-1.275L21 12l-5.813-1.912a2 2 0 0 1-1.275-1.275L12 3Z"/></svg>Start Assessment</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #0F3D91; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a52c4; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0F3D91; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost/outline button for secondary actions. No icon required.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #0F3D91; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid #d4e3ff; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #E8F0FE; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #d4e3ff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0F3D91; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Blue Chip
components.description: Default chip for interest tags, category labels, sector indicators.
components.css: .ds-chip-blue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #E8F0FE; color: #0F3D91; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #d4e3ff; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; }

components.name: Gold Chip
components.css: .ds-chip-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #fffbe6; color: #92710a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #FCD116; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card. Flat at rest, shadow on hover.
components.html:
Computer Systems Servicing NC II

Learn to install, configure, and maintain computer systems and networks.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e5e8ef; padding: 20px; transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; color: #1A1A2E; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 12px; color: #6B7280; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Standard text input with search icon. Focus shows Depth Blue ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #6B7280; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e8ef; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 40px; font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; color: #1A1A2E; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0F3D91; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #E8F0FE; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7280; }

components.name: Active Nav Tab
components.description: Active navigation tab in top navbar.
components.html: AI Matcher
components.css: .ds-nav-tab-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #E8F0FE; color: #0F3D91; font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid #d4e3ff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: User Chat Bubble
components.description: Chat message from the user. Depth Blue background with white text.
components.html:
May allowance po ba habang nag-aaral sa TESDA?
2:30 PM
components.css: .ds-chat-user { background: #0F3D91; color: #fff; border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 16px; padding: 12px 20px; max-width: 75%; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-chat-user-text { font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; word-break: break-word; } .ds-chat-user-time { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Model Chat Bubble
components.description: Chat message from Ka-TrabaHO AI. White card on tinted background.
components.css: .ds-chat-model { background: #fff; color: #1A1A2E; border: 1px solid #e5e8ef; border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 4px; padding: 12px 20px; max-width: 75%; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); white-space: pre-line; } .ds-chat-model-text { font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; word-break: break-word; } .ds-chat-model-time { font-size: 11px; color: #6B7280; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Signature gradient stat card for key metrics. Depth Blue gradient with white text.
components.html:
300+
Courses across 5 sectors
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F3D91 0%, #1a52c4 100%); color: #fff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(15,61,145,0.2); } .ds-stat-number { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-suffix { font-size: 24px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.9; }

narrative.overview:
A doorway always left open. No barriers, no gatekeeping — step through and the path is lit. Every screen in Ka-TrabaHO is that doorstep: welcoming, clear, and always pointing forward. The design rejects both the stiffness of government portals and the coldness of corporate dashboards. Instead, it borrows the warmth of a neighbor's front gate — you walk up, you see the way in, and nobody asks for your credentials at the door.

The palette is anchored in two colors drawn from the Philippine flag: Depth Blue for trust and structure, Sunshine Gold for hope and energy. These are not decorative choices — they carry cultural recognition. A Filipino youth seeing deep navy and golden yellow instinctively reads "official, but ours." The blue does the structural work; the gold does the emotional work. Everything else is neutral canvas so the two flag colors breathe.

The system is mobile-first by conviction, not by compromise. The audience is on basic smartphones with prepaid data. Every pixel, every request, every animation frame must justify itself against a 3G connection and a 5.5-inch screen.
keyCharacteristics: Resting calm, lifted on touch — cards are flat at rest; depth appears only on interaction
Flag-anchored palette — Depth Blue structures, Sunshine Gold energizes; neutral carries the content
Mobile-first density — generous touch targets, no wasted vertical space, single-column default
Bilingual by design — every label and error message exists in Taglish and English as first-class copies
One action per screen — the next step is always visible, always tappable

rules.name: The Two-Anchor Rule
rules.body: Depth Blue and Sunshine Gold are the only saturated colors on any given screen. All other hues are semantic and context-bound — they appear only when the state demands them, never as decoration.

rules.name: The Neutral-90 Rule
rules.body: At least 90% of any screen's surface area is neutral (background, white cards, slate text, borders). The anchors punctuate; they do not paint.

rules.name: The Weight-Gap Rule
rules.body: A heading and its adjacent body text must differ by at least 200 in font-weight. If a headline is 700 and the description beneath it is 600, the hierarchy collapses.

rules.name: The Rest-Flat Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow at rest. Shadows are reserved for hover, focus, and modal overlays. If a card has a shadow with no user interaction, the shadow is ambient noise and must be removed.

dos: Do use Depth Blue and Sunshine Gold as the only saturated colors on any screen. All other hues are semantic and appear only when state demands them.
Do keep cards flat at rest with 1px #e5e8ef borders. Shadows appear only on hover/focus.
Do pair Plus Jakarta Sans at 700-900 weight with Inter at 400-500. The weight gap IS the hierarchy.
Do use generous line-height (1.7) for body text — the audience reads on small screens and needs breathing room.
Do ensure every interactive element has a visible focus indicator (3px Depth Blue Light ring) and a minimum 44px touch target.
Do write every label, error message, and celebration in both Taglish and English as first-class copy.
Do use the brand-tinted shadow for hover states — the blue tint ties depth to the brand.
Do surface the next concrete action on every screen. Dead ends are failures.
donts: Don't create the look of a government portal — dense text walls, tiny fonts, outdated layouts, bureaucratic tone. Ka-TrabaHO must never feel like paperwork.
Don't create the look of a corporate SaaS dashboard — navy-and-white tables, metric dashboards, HR-manager aesthetics.
Don't use ambient shadows on resting cards. Flat-at-rest is the doctrine.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Use solid Depth Blue for emphasis via weight or size.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use more than two saturated non-semantic colors on any single screen.
Don't use slate (#6B7280) for body text on tinted backgrounds without verifying ≥4.5:1 contrast.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section. One deliberate eyebrow on the hero is voice; eyebrows everywhere is AI grammar.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
